result.reason: Implement functionality to merge configuration files and auto-export, enhancing configuration management.
result.approach: Implement new service to merge multiple configuration files based on defined rules, and extend existing saving mechanisms to support automatic export of the merged configuration. This will involve modifying existing loaders/savers and potentially creating new serialization logic.
